name: @locusai/locus-cron
description: Standalone cron job scheduler for Locus with PM2 worker support

locus.description: Standalone cron job scheduler with human-readable intervals

scripts.build: bun build src/cli.ts --outfile bin/locus-cron.js --target node && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir ./dist --target node --format esm && bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile ./dist/index.cjs --target node --format cjs && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --emitDeclarationOnly
